name: Status Update
description: Regular status update with clear progress tracking
subject: Status Update: [Project/Initiative Name]
body:
Hi [Name],

I wanted to provide you with a comprehensive update on [Project/Initiative Name].

**Progress to Date:**
✓ [Completed Item 1]
✓ [Completed Item 2]

**Current Focus:**
→ [Current Item 1]
→ [Current Item 2]
→ [Current Item 3]

**Timeline:**
[Item 1] - 90% complete, on track for [Date]
[Item 2] - 60% complete, on track for [Date]
[Item 3] - 30% complete, on track for [Date]

**Blockers/Risks:**
[Issue/Risk]: [Mitigation Strategy]

**Next Steps:**
1. [Action 1] - Expected completion [Date]
2. [Action 2] - Expected completion [Date]
3. [Action 3] - Expected completion [Date]

Everything is proceeding on schedule. I'll provide the next update on [Frequency].

Best regards,
[Your Name]
